title: Old Pearls
body:
# OldPearls
In version 1.21.2, Mojang made it so pearls keep velocity on landing. This plugin reverts this change, making pearls reset velocity, just like before 1.21.2.

Supports version **1.21.2-1.21.7**.

## Installation
You **must** install [PacketEvents](https://github.com/retrooper/packetevents/releases) for this plugin to work.
